namespace_definition.note: The namespace is the source origin of the package ecosystem, such as nixpkgs, nixos-hardware, or a custom flake name.

name_definition.note: The exact, case-sensitive attribute path of the package within the target package set.

version_definition.note: The upstream version of the nix package.

qualifiers_definition.description: The Git commit hash (hexadecimal) identifying the exact revision of the origin repository from which the package is evaluated.
The target system architecture and operating system platform tuple for which the package is built (e.g., x86_64-linux, aarch64-darwin).
The specific multi-output derivation name of the package (e.g., out, dev, lib, bin, man). Defaults to 'out' if omitted.
